creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
While we're waiting for the new version of python, be on the safe side and add patches for CVE-2008-2315, CVE-2008-2316, CVE-2008-3142, and CVE-2008-3144.  These should be documented in vuxml.  lang/python24 should also be patched for these, and also for CVE-2008-3143.

(See, for example, 

http://www.gentoo.org/security/en/glsa/glsa-200807-16.xml  ,

and the links in that page.)

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
